title: Book of the Dead, Spell 25: Causing the Deceased to Remember His Name
source: Papyrus of Ani; Papyrus of Nu; various papyri
description: Spell 25 of the Egyptian Book of the Dead — the most extensive collection of funerary texts from any ancient civilization.
introduction: Spell 25 of the Egyptian Book of the Dead — the most extensive collection of funerary texts from any ancient civilization.

translation.text: From the Book of the Dead, Spell 25: 'Causing the Deceased to Remember His Name.' This spell empowered the deceased to navigate the dangers of the underworld and achieve eternal life among the gods. The full text was inscribed on papyrus and placed in the tomb.
